pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from source/target to release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: While source/target works, the release flag is the standard for Java 9+ to ensure consistent module path and API usage; older configurations may lead to subtle compatibility issues or warnings in modern toolchains.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add exclusion for junit (v4) from rest-maven-plugin to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5.
Add dependency management for metrics-graphite to enforce version 4.2.28.
Remove explicit version tags from dependencies managed by Spring Boot BOM.
Update various plugin and library versions to be compatible with Spring Boot 3 and Java 17.

src/main/resources/application-aws.yml.general_idea: Update Redis configuration property prefix to match Spring Boot 3.x naming conventions.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Replace deprecated spring.profiles with spring.config.activate.on-profile for Spring Boot 3.x compatibility
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: spring.profiles is deprecated in Spring Boot 3.x and may cause warnings or be removed in future versions; spring.config.activate.on-profile is the new standard for profile activation in YAML

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Refactor XML string construction to use Java 17 text blocks for improved readability.
Refactor JSON string construction to use Java 17 text blocks for improved readability.
Remove deprecated JUnit 5 Spring extension annotation and import in favor of automatic detection in Spring Boot 3.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.why_exists: The @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) annotation is redundant in Spring Boot 3 and JUnit 5 Jupiter, as the extension is auto-registered. While not strictly a compile error, it is a breaking pattern in the context of Spring Boot 3 migration guides which enforce cleaner test configurations, and the import removal is required if the class is no longer referenced.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/builders/.general_idea: Migrate string concatenation to Java 17 Text Blocks for improved readability.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Remove explicit SpringExtension registration as it is auto-detected in Spring Boot 3 / JUnit 5 Jupiter.
src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.why_exists: SpringExtension is deprecated and no longer required; while not strictly a compile error in all versions, it is removed to align with Spring Boot 3 standards and avoid deprecation warnings or potential conflicts with the new test context infrastructure.

src/test/java/org/prebid/cache/models/Pa.general_idea: Replace manual string concatenation with Java 17 text blocks for improved readability.
